assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Control plane first (required)' in upgrade strategy and provides specific Phase 2 for control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides exact order: coordinating→data→master with detailed rationale for each (lowest impact, most critical, maintain quorum)

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Regional PD-SSD (good - can attach to nodes in any zone)' and addresses this in risk mitigation section

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete PDB YAML configuration with maxUnavailable=1 for master nodes, which ensures 2/3 remain available (maintaining quorum)

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0' for all pools and provides gcloud commands to configure this setting

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes curl commands to check cluster health after each phase and specifically mentions waiting for GREEN status

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain - this safety measure is not addressed

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides node monitoring commands but does not include specific kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes 'Recent snapshot completed' in pre-upgrade checklist and mentions snapshots as 'Last resort data recovery option'
